# AI Coding Guidelines for Projeto-Integrador

## Project Overview
This is a database design project ("Projeto-Integrador") for an e-commerce system focused on video games. The primary deliverable is a database schema with tables for managing clients, products (games), sales, inventory, and related entities.

## Database Schema
- **Primary Tables**: Clientes (Clients), Produtos (Products), Vendas (Sales), Estoques (Stocks)
- **Secondary Tables**: Histórico de Vendas (Sales History), Plataformas (Platforms), Categorias de Jogos (Game Categories), Itens do Carrinho (Cart Items), Usuários (Users)
- Table names are in Portuguese, reflecting the project's language conventions.

## Key Files and Structure
- [BANCO DE DADOS/README.md](BANCO DE DADOS/README.md): Overview of database tables and their importance hierarchy
- DOCUMENTAÇÃO DO PI.docx: Additional project documentation (Word document)

## Development Conventions
- Use Portuguese for database object names (tables, columns) to maintain consistency with existing schema
- Prioritize design of core tables (Clientes, Produtos, Vendas, Estoques) before secondary ones
- No code implementation yet; focus on schema design and documentation

## Workflow
- Update [BANCO DE DADOS/README.md](BANCO DE DADOS/README.md) when adding new tables or modifying schema
- Maintain the importance hierarchy when expanding the database
